# SRC030 - Advertising in the Age of Agentic AI

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | AI Marketing |
| Authors / source | Kim et al. |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | Academic call for research |
| Quality | Medium |
| URL | [https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/15252019.2025.2557107](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/15252019.2025.2557107) |

## Bias / limitation

Research agenda rather than tested system.

## Core takeaway

AI agents and AI-powered search will transform advertising processes and measurement questions.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use for future-facing AI-search and agentic-commerce strategy.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC030

- What it proves:

- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
